code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_LoadBalancer] --> Batch.Received.Event
    Batch.Received.Event --> Batch.Started.State
    Batch.Started.State --> Job.Received.Event
    Job.Received.Event --> Job.Received.State
    Job.Received.State --> Job.Completed.Event
    Job.Completed.Event --> Job.Completed.State
    Job.Completed.State --> Batch.Job.Done.Event
    Batch.Job.Done.Event --> Batch.Finished.State
    Batch.Finished.State --> [Infra_WorkerNode]
    Job.Received.State --> Job.Failed.Event
    Job.Failed.Event --> Job.Failed.State
    Job.Failed.State --> Batch.Job.Done.Failed.Event
    Batch.Job.Done.Failed.Event --> Batch.Failed.State
    Batch.Failed.State --> [Infra_IngressController]
    [Infra_WorkerNode] --> Batch.Received.Failed.Event
    Batch.Received.Failed.Event --> Batch.Failed.State

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个批处理作业的状态流转图，核心是从负载均衡器接收请求开始，到工作节点完成或失败结束。起点是Infra_LoadBalancer，终点要分两种情况：正常完成走到Infra_WorkerNode，失败的话走到Infra_IngressController。
明白，所以负载均衡器触发的是Batch.Received.Event对吧？然后这个事件进入Batch.Started.State。我想确认一下，Job的层级是在Batch内部吗？我看到有Job.Received.Event和Job.Received.State这些节点。
对，Batch启动后会创建具体的Job。Job有自己的生命周期：从Job.Received.Event到Job.Received.State，然后正常走完Job.Completed.Event到Job.Completed.State，最后汇总到Batch.Job.Done.Event。
好的，我梳理一下正常流程：Batch.Job.Done.Event之后进入Batch.Finished.State，然后连到Infra_WorkerNode。但Job也可能失败，我需要在Job.Received.State后面加一条失败分支到Job.Failed.Event吗？

没错，Job.Failed.Event到Job.Failed.State，然后走Batch.Job.Done.Failed.Event汇入Batch.Failed.State。另外还有一个入口失败的情况：如果Batch.Received.Event之前就出问题，从Infra_WorkerNode直接触发Batch.Received.Failed.Event，也走到Batch.Failed.State。

已经画好了。起点Infra_LoadBalancer连接Batch.Received.Event，主流程经过Batch.Started.State、Job各状态到Batch.Finished.State，最终到Infra_WorkerNode。失败路径有两条：Job失败经过Job.Failed.State到Batch.Failed.State，以及从Infra_WorkerNode返回的Batch.Received.Failed.Event也到Batch.Failed.State，最后Batch.Failed.State指向Infra_IngressController。

等等，最后那条路径有问题。Batch.Received.Failed.Event的起点应该是Infra_WorkerNode吗？让我再想想——不对，这个事件是接收失败，应该从负载均衡器或入口侧触发，但按照我们的设计，它是从Infra_WorkerNode返回的异常事件。不过我刚发现描述里写的是从Infra_WorkerNode出发，这其实是正确的，表示工作节点回告接收失败。但我之前说错了，Batch.Received.Failed.Event应该连到Batch.Failed.State，而不是我随口说的其他状态。
确认修正：Batch.Received.Failed.Event从Infra_WorkerNode出发，汇入Batch.Failed.State。现在整个状态图完整了，包含正常完成流、Job失败流、以及入口接收失败流，三个终点状态清晰：Batch.Finished.State到Infra_WorkerNode，Batch.Failed.State到Infra_IngressController。
